v1: Service calls have an initial call-out fee of $150 for the first half hour.
Subsequent time is charged at $98 per hour for residential, billed in half-hour increments ($49 per half hour).
Clara should mention pricing only when asked by the customer.
v2: Handling calls from new clients, small jobs, and service calls.
Hourly charge: $98 per hour for residential services, billed in half-hour increments ($49 per half-hour).
Clara should mention the service call fee and hourly rates if the caller inquires about minimum fees or estimates.

v1: Calls received after hours from GNM Pressure Washing or mentioning properties they manage (Chevron and Esso gas stations).
v2: Calls from GNM Pressure Washing (property management company) or related to Chevron/SOs gas stations (properties they manage) for emergency services after business hours.

changes.v1: For non-emergency calls after hours, Clara will inform callers that the business will get back to them on the next business day.
changes.v2: During business hours, Clara handles calls, but can transfer to Ben upon request. After hours, non-emergency calls will be advised to call back the next business day.

changes.v1: For emergency calls (from GNM Pressure Washing or managed gas stations), transfer the call to Ben's second number. For all other calls, inform the caller that the business will respond the next business day.
changes.v2: For calls identifying as GNM Pressure Washing or related to their managed gas stations, transfer the call to Ben. For all other non-emergency callers, provide a message stating the business is closed and will return calls the next business day.

changes.v1: Clara will answer incoming calls and provide information based on the website and discussed pricing. If a caller requests to speak with Ben, Clara will transfer the call to Ben's second number.
changes.v2: Initially, calls to Ben's main line are forwarded to Clara if Ben doesn't answer or declines. Once Ben's second personal phone number is active, Clara will be the primary answer point, screening calls and transferring to Ben (on his second number) upon request.

v1: What is the primary business phone number from which calls will be forwarded to Clara?
What is the IANA timezone for the business (e.g., America/Los_Angeles)?
What is Ben's personal second phone number to which calls should be transferred for direct conversations (including emergencies)?
What is the phone number to which post-call SMS notifications should be sent?
v2: What is the primary business phone number for Ben's Electric Solutions?
What is Ben's operating timezone (IANA format, e.g., America/Los_Angeles)?
What is Ben's dedicated phone number that will be used for call transfers from Clara, especially for emergency calls and requested transfers?
Are there any specific secondary contacts and their phone numbers for emergency routing, in case Ben is unavailable?

What are the specific call transfer rules (e.g., timeout duration before voicemail, number of retry attempts, or a custom failure message) Clara should use when attempting to transfer a call to a live person?
Are there any specific CRM, scheduling, or other business systems that Ben's Electric Solutions uses that Clara Answers should integrate with?

changes.v1:
Ben is the sole person currently taking incoming calls for new clients, small jobs, and service calls.
Initial setup for call forwarding: calls divert to Clara only if Ben does not answer or declines from his main number.
Target setup for call forwarding (after Ben gets his second number): Clara will be the first point of contact for all calls, with transfers to Ben's second number for direct conversations.
Post-call email notifications will be sent to info@bendselectricsolutionsteam.com.
The initial contract term is 3 months; the price will remain the same if extended to a 12-month term.
A follow-up meeting is scheduled for Friday at 2 PM to review test calls, dashboard features, and discuss going live over the weekend.
changes.v2: Ben signed a 12-month term (price locked), but discussing a 3-month start. Email for notifications: info@Ben's Electric Solutions team.com. SMS notifications will be sent to Ben's main phone number. Next meeting scheduled for Friday at 2 PM (client's local time) for 15-20 minutes to review test calls and dashboard. Goal is to go live this weekend after testing.
